title: CSS Houdini Quiz
description: Test your understanding of the CSS Houdini APIs: @property, Paint API, and typed custom properties
referenceSolutions: @property registers typed custom properties enabling animation

validationRules.message: Select the correct answer about CSS Houdini

hints.text: CSS Houdini gives developers low-level access to the CSS engine. @property lets you define typed custom properties with initial values and inheritance.
@property --my-color { syntax: '<color>'; initial-value: blue; inherits: false; } enables animating custom properties between color values.
@property registers a custom property with a type, allowing the browser to interpolate it in animations. Without @property, custom properties are opaque strings and cannot be smoothly animated.
